name: s2-backend
description: Plugin for generating and validating Java backend code following DDD: package-per-aggregate, checked exceptions, one-controller-per-action, Object Mothers, Modulith Use Cases.

s2-setup-claude.description: Generates CLAUDE.md with skill references based on the chosen architectural style

s2-create-plan.description: Creates an implementation plan with vertical phases and public contracts

s2-execute-plan.description: Executes the current phase of the implementation plan

s2-review.description: Validates architecture, naming conventions, and code quality

s2-generate-api-docs.description: Generates API documentation in Markdown for the frontend team from Java controllers
